18:00 Hey Uzoth! I love your videos and the Blox fruits, and after watching this video I wanted to tell you that I have an idea that could change the Blox fruits and maybe be incorporated in a future update. First, it would be to add an NPC or system that can revert reworked fruits to their original attacks, like the Pain Fruit or the Rumble Fruit, so that OG players can continue enjoying the old fruits, since most are probably used to the abilities before the rework. Another thing that could be interesting is having a better farming system, like being able to cast abilities even if you're AFK, something similar to the Sailor Piece. And obviously, adding the option to automatically repeat quests. And lastly making a better interface to the crews and allowing to change name but with fragments or berries also adding option to request joining a crew and allowing inviting offline player that's all i wish you read my comment.
